---
name: Task
about: Subordinate work under a Story, or a standalone chore
title: "[Task] "
labels: ["type:task"]
assignees: []
---

# Summary

One- or two-sentence description.

## Parent

#<story-issue-number> — link to the parent Story. Leave blank for standalone chores (infra work, dependency upgrades, build-system maintenance, etc.).

## Done When

Observable condition(s) that mean this Task is complete. Keep it tight — Tasks should not need long acceptance criteria; if they do, it's probably a Story.

- [ ] Condition 1

## Notes

Optional. Links, hints, gotchas.
